title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Assistant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
